overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character in a red coat walking along a forest trail at night. The character approaches and passes a small wooden cabin with snow-capped mountains visible in the background under a cloudy, starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the forest

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
mixed forest trees with autumn foliage on the left
large mountain peak visible through the trees in the distance
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. Tall pine trees line the right side while deciduous trees fill the left, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distant center background.

events.description: small wooden cabin becomes visible in the clearing ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the small wooden cabin situated in the forest clearing

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with a sloped roof in the clearing

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the forest opens into a small clearing where a wooden cabin comes into view. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the left as the path curves toward the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail past the cabin

events.description: character passes the wooden cabin and continues along the curving path

agents.ego_description: walking past the cabin and continuing along the winding trail deeper into the forest

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden cabin, leaving it behind on the left, and continues along the winding dirt trail. The forest remains dense with the snow-capped mountain visible to the left as the journey continues through the moonlit woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense nocturnal forest that briefly opens into a clearing before returning to the deep woods. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine and deciduous trees, with a snow-capped mountain looming in the distant center. As the character continues forward, the forest opens into a small clearing where a wooden cabin comes into view and the mountain shifts toward the left as the path curves. The scene then shifts as the character passes the cabin, leaving the structure behind on the left while the trail winds further into the moonlit woods. Finally, the camera follows the journey deeper into the dense forest with the snow-capped mountain remaining visible to the left.
